entity_proposals.description: This class encompasses properties related to the existence and uniqueness of solutions in numerical methods.
entity_proposals.justification: A new class is needed to specifically address the properties of solutions, such as feasibility and uniqueness, which are not adequately covered by existing classes that focus on broader mathematical concepts.
